Body.Content:
Outlook for Mac now supports Data Loss Prevention (DLP) policy tips, helping users avoid accidental data leaks. When sensitive content is detected, users are alerted with inline tips or pop-ups, based on admin-configured rules.

GA date: May CY2026

Preview date: November CY2025

message.Title: Outlook: Data Loss Prevention (DLP) Policy Tips & Override in Outlook for Mac
